title: dammara orientalis
intro: Dammara orientalis, also known as Agathis alba or Dammara, is a type of evergreen coniferous tree native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Dammara orientalis include treating respiratory issues, skin conditions, and wounds, as well as reducing fever and alleviating pain. Dammara orientalis can be prepared as an herbal remedy through extraction into oils or tinctures, and is also used in traditional Asian medicine to make teas and infusions.
